BBQ 56 | Atlanta BBQ | 1538 Ralph David Abernathy Boulevard, Atlanta, GA, USA
top of page
1563 Ralph David Abernathy Blvd, Atlanta, GA 30310.

BBQ 56
Coming in HOT!
Weekly menu
get to know us
About
Since 1956, BBQ 56 has been serving the greater Atlanta area delicious, home cooked meals directly from our kitchen to yours. Bringing our unique sensibility, style, and taste to each affair, our founder, along with one of the most dynamic teams in the city, quickly gained acclaim for highlighting the natural tastes of fresh food. Contact us to learn more.
homecooked meals
Deriving from a long lineage of backyard barbecue lovers, BBQ 56 embosses the epitome of Southern Style barbecue. Providing quality cuts of meats & continuous upstanding service, BBQ 56 strives to provide consistency, quality & most importantly, delicious barbecue.
services we offer
Hosting an event that you’d like BBQ 56 to be apart of? Whether you’re planning to host an intimate dinner party with your closest family and friends, or even a larger gathering to celebrate a birthday, engagement party, holiday, or special occasion — we’ve got you covered! Our catering services bring the most delicious smoked meats & sides directly to you for gatherings of all sizes. Feel free to contact us with details, allowing us to schedule & provide you with an accurate quote!
"I've been in Atlanta for over 20 years. This is the best BBQ EVER!"
"I just have to say that this is the most Amazing BBQ!! I love the tenderness of the smoked chicken. Add the mustard sauce and you will not be disappointed! The rib tips, pork chops, and sausages are also absolutely Amazing! I definitely recommend this new mobile eatery in the community on Sundays! This is definitely the talk of the community."
"BBQ 56 is a true gem for the barbecue lovers of atlanta! The smoky aroma hits you as soon as you get onto Ralph david abernathy blvd, and the friendly service definitely adds to the welcoming atmosphere."
bottom of page

meta.meta_description: Low, slow smoked Atlanta BBQ food cooked over fruit wood. Eat with us at BBQ56!
